testcase.name: test_delete_staff
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_staff_module.py:119: in reseller_token assert response.status_code == 200, f"Reseller login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Reseller login failed: {"error":"Rate limit exceeded: 5 per 1 minute"} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_created_staff_can_login
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_staff_module.py:326: in test_created_staff_can_login assert login_response.status_code == 200, f"Staff login failed: {login_response.text}" E AssertionError: Staff login failed: {"error":"Rate limit exceeded: 5 per 1 minute"} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_staff_cannot_list_other_staff
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_staff_module.py:354: in reseller_token return response.json()["access_token"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'access_token'

testcase.name: test_existing_staff_user_login
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_staff_module.py:417: in test_existing_staff_user_login assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"error":"Rate limit exceeded: 5 per 1 minute"} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
